items.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (Tukey)
items.author: John W. Tukey
items.note: Foundational EDA text introducing box plots and IQR-based outlier thinking.

items.title: Robust Statistics (Huber & Ronchetti)
items.author: Peter J. Huber, Elvezio M. Ronchetti
items.note: Theory of robust estimation and M-estimators underlying Huber loss and resistant summaries.

items.title: scikit-learn — HuberRegressor
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical robust linear regression that limits outlier leverage on targets.

items.title: pandas.Series.quantile
items.author: pandas developers
items.note: Reference for computing Q1, Q3, and percentile bounds used in IQR and winsorization.
